notes: Router Version Control: full versioning system with temporal snapshots, soft deletes, change tracking, approval workflow, and dependency links. Build-Level Consumption: scan-based consumption against BOM with allocation cross-referencing. Assembly Readiness: multi-vendor REQ modal, smart consume, physical inventory linking, NR filter, inline update fix. Traveler Publish: rev display on AllTravelers/TravelerManagement/TravelerFocus, eBOM router popover overhaul. Inventory documents soft delete. Interview submissions. Database: 7 new migrations (035-041), 5 new tables, 52 new columns across 17 tables.
